steps.text: Clarify what is (and is not) known or findable about the fictional 2024 Zorblax Institute cold-fusion trials, given that they are not real-world events.

Identify any existing uses of the term "Zorblax" (without "Institute") or similarly named fictional institutions in literature, games, or online discussions that might provide context or prior fictional canon.

Search for any discussions, speculative articles, or creative works that mention "2024 Zorblax Institute cold-fusion trials" or closely related phrases, to ensure there is no pre-existing fan-made or fictional material to summarise.

If no grounded external material exists, draft a concise explanation for the user that the trials are fictional and that there are no published findings to summarise, while offering options for how to proceed (e.g., help invent plausible findings or structure a fictional report).
